summary: Iteration 11 testing complete. All 71 backend tests pass (100%). Verified new Hardware Diagnostics Panel in Settings tab with summary badges (CAM, I2C, SPI, UART, MAV), Re-Scan button, Platform section (kernel/OS), Camera section (CSI/USB), I2C/SPI/UART sections, MAVLink/FC section (connected, FC type, firmware), and GPIO section. All 7 tabs work without errors. In container environment: no real hardware detected (camera=NONE, I2C=0, SPI=N/A, UART=N/A) but MAVLink shows connected via simulator.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend /api/health returns status ok with mode='native' - VERIFIED
Backend /api/diagnostics returns cached diagnostics with all sections - VERIFIED
Backend /api/diagnostics/scan POST triggers fresh scan and returns new timestamp - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has summary with platform, camera, i2c_devices, spi_available, uart_available, mavlink_connected, gpio_available, overall - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has platform section with is_raspberry_pi, kernel, os - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has camera array with CSI and USB camera detection - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has i2c section with available, buses, devices - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has spi section with available, devices, info - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has uart section with ports array and available_count - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has gpio section with sysfs_available, gpiomem, gpiochip0 - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has mavlink section with connected, fc_type, fc_firmware - VERIFIED
Backend diagnostics has timestamp and scan_duration_ms metadata - VERIFIED
All 71 backend pytest tests pass (12 new diagnostics tests) - VERIFIED
Settings tab: Hardware Diagnostics Panel visible with [data-testid='diagnostics-panel'] - VERIFIED
Settings tab: Summary badges visible (CAM: NONE, I2C: 0 DEV, SPI: N/A, UART: N/A, MAV: OK) - VERIFIED

Settings tab: Camera section shows CSI Camera (not detected) and USB Camera (not detected) - VERIFIED
Settings tab: I2C BUS (0 BUS) section shows I2C bus not available - VERIFIED
Settings tab: SPI BUS section shows SPI not available - VERIFIED
Settings tab: UART (0 PORTS) section shows 5 unavailable ports - VERIFIED
Settings tab: MAVLink/FC section shows Connected=YES, FC TYPE=QUADROTOR, Firmware=ArduPilot 4.5.0 - VERIFIED
Settings tab: GPIO section shows sysfs=N/A, gpiomem=N/A, gpiochip0=N/A - VERIFIED
Dashboard tab renders correctly with 3D view, telemetry, System Monitor - VERIFIED
All 7 tabs work: Dashboard, Telemetry, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Events, Docs, Settings - VERIFIED
Camera/VO tab shows simulated visual odometry with 20 features - VERIFIED
No console errors on any tab (only cosmetic chart dimension warnings) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: diagnostics.py properly uses subprocess for hardware detection (vcgencmd, i2cdetect, v4l2-ctl)
Caching mechanism in diagnostics.py avoids repeated scans via _cached_result global
server.py lifespan hook runs initial diagnostics scan at startup
DiagnosticsPanel.js properly uses apiCall for GET/POST diagnostics endpoints
3-column layout in DiagnosticsPanel.js well-organized: Platform+Camera | I2C+SPI | UART+MAVLink+GPIO
Status badges correctly color-coded: emerald for OK, slate for N/A
All data-testid attributes properly set: diagnostics-panel, diagnostics-summary, diagnostics-scan-btn

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 71 API tests pass (added 12 new diagnostics tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI tests pass, Hardware Diagnostics Panel verified

seed_data_creation: N/A - Hardware diagnostics uses real system detection (gracefully degrades in container)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified new Hardware Diagnostics feature: 1) Backend /api/diagnostics returns cached diagnostics with all hardware detection results (camera, I2C, SPI, UART, GPIO, MAVLink). 2) Backend /api/diagnostics/scan POST triggers fresh scan with new timestamp. 3) Frontend DiagnosticsPanel in Settings tab shows 3-column layout with summary badges, Re-Scan button, and all 7 sections (Platform, Camera, I2C, SPI, UART, MAVLink/FC, GPIO). 4) In container environment: no real hardware detected but MAVLink shows connected via C++ native simulator. 5) On real Raspberry Pi, it would detect CSI camera, I2C devices at known addresses, UART ports. Total 71 backend tests pass.
